outliers: Creative Judge: scored 6 vs median 7 - Judges agreed the voice is generally distinct with professional identity, but Creative Judge found more reliance on clichés than others
Rules Judge: scored 8 vs median 7 - Found imagery more consistently vivid and controlled than other judges, especially praising the marine biology detail
Holistic Judge: scored 6 vs median 7 - Found some descriptions cliché and wanted more emotional integration with sensory experience

assessment: The opening effectively establishes a mystery with clear narrative progression and a professionally grounded protagonist. While imagery shows strength with specific marine details, some storm descriptions remain somewhat generic. The voice is distinct but occasionally relies on familiar phrasing, and coherence is logical though the emotional transition could be more seamless.
judge_agreement: All judges strongly agreed on coherence (score 7) and found the narrative arc logical. They agreed the voice was professional and distinct, though Creative Judge was more critical of clichés. Imagery showed the most divergence, with one judge praising its vividness while another found it inconsistent.
